frames.content: Intro screen with tennis ball animation.

args.description: Intro animation — match about to begin

frames.content: Australian Open — Thiem vs Sandgren. Match point. Thiem preparing to serve from the baseline. Full court view visible.

args.description: Thiem preparing to serve at match point. Full court visible, Melbourne.

frames.content: Thiem has served. Ball is in the air crossing the net. Sandgren preparing to return. Rally beginning.

args.description: Serve delivered. Ball crossing net. Rally starting.

frames.content: Rally in progress. Both players at baseline exchanging groundstrokes. Ball visible on Sandgren's side.

args.description: Baseline rally in progress. Forehand exchange.

frames.content: Thiem hits a deep forehand. Ball lands near the baseline. Sandgren stretching to reach it.

args.description: Deep forehand by Thiem. Sandgren stretching at baseline.

frames.content: Sandgren's return goes long past the baseline. Ball clearly lands outside the court. Point to Thiem.

args.announcement: Out! Return lands long past the baseline.

frames.content: Players resetting positions. Thiem won the previous point. Score now 15-0.

args.description: Players resetting. Thiem leads 15-0.

frames.content: New match — Shapovalov vs Zverev in Madrid. Clay court. Shapovalov preparing to serve. Score: 4-30 vs 5-40.

args.description: Madrid Open. Shapovalov serving at 4-5, 30-40. Break point for Zverev.

frames.content: Shapovalov serves. Ball heading toward the service box. Zverev positioning to return.

args.description: Serve in motion. Zverev ready to return.

frames.content: Rally on clay. Both players exchanging from baseline. Ball visible between players.

args.description: Clay court rally. Baseline exchange in progress.

frames.content: Zverev hits a powerful forehand winner down the line. Shapovalov cannot reach it. Clean winner.

args.announcement: Winner! Forehand down the line by Player 2!

frames.content: Zverev celebrating the winner. Fist pump. Shapovalov walking back to baseline.

args.description: Player 2 celebrates winner. Players resetting.

frames.content: Players resetting for next point. Shapovalov bouncing ball to serve.

args.description: Preparing for next serve. 15-15.

frames.content: New match — Medvedev vs De Minaur in Sydney. Hard court. Full court view. Medvedev about to serve.

args.description: Sydney. Medvedev serving. Full court visible.

frames.content: Rally in progress. Both players positioned at baseline. Fast exchange.

args.description: Fast baseline rally. Both players engaged.

frames.content: De Minaur hits the ball into the net. Unforced error. Point to Medvedev.

args.announcement: Into the net! Unforced error. Point to Player 1.

args.reason: Opponent's unforced error into the net

frames.content: Players resetting. Medvedev leads 30-15.

args.description: Point over. Players walking back. 30-15.

frames.content: New match — Federer vs Nadal at Australian Open. Deuce. Both players at baseline. Epic rally moment.

args.description: Federer vs Nadal! Australian Open. Deuce point. Rally in progress.

frames.content: Federer approaches the net. Nadal hitting a passing shot. Ball heading cross-court.

args.description: Federer at net. Nadal attempting a passing shot.

frames.content: Nadal's passing shot goes wide. Ball lands outside the sideline. Point to Federer.

args.announcement: Out! Passing shot goes wide. Point to Player 1.

frames.content: Federer pumping fist after winning the point. Crowd reacting.

args.description: Player 1 celebrating. Crowd reacting. 40-15.

frames.content: Players preparing for next point. Federer serving at 40-15.

args.description: Serve preparation. Player 1 at 40-15.

frames.content: New match — Sandgren vs Chung at Australian Open. Match point #5. Chung serving. Full court view.

args.description: Sandgren vs Chung. Match point. Full court Melbourne.

frames.content: Chung serves. Ball heading to service box. Sandgren preparing to return.

args.description: Serve in motion at match point.

frames.content: Rally in progress. Both players hitting from baseline. Intense exchange at match point.

args.description: Intense rally at match point. Both at baseline.

frames.content: Sandgren hits a forehand winner. Ball lands in. Clean shot past Chung.

args.announcement: Ace! Clean winner! Game, set, match!

frames.content: Sandgren celebrating match point. Arms raised. Crowd cheering.

args.description: Match point won! Player celebrating. Game to Player 1.

frames.content: Continued celebration. Players at the net.

args.description: Players at net. Sportsmanship.

frames.content: New serve. Player 2 now serving after changeover.

args.description: Changeover complete. Player 2 serving.

frames.content: Serve delivered. Return hit back. Rally beginning.

args.description: New rally starting on Player 2's serve.

frames.content: End of clip.

args.description: End of highlights compilation.
